# Version 3.0.0
> **SkiaSharp 3 preview line** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.0.0-preview)
> **Superseded by [3.116.0](3.116.0.md)** · Never released as stable — these changes rolled up into 3.116.0.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.0.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.0.0 previewed the v3 line — Skia m116, WinUI accelerated views, and a full [Obsolete] cleanup. The preview line modernised the repository for v3, moved everything to .NET 8, added Metal on Mac Catalyst, WinUI accelerated views and Blazor DPI, and removed all remaining `[Obsolete]` members. This line was never released as stable — everything here rolled up into 3.116.0.

## Breaking Changes

- **All previously [Obsolete] members and types are removed** — Every member and type that was marked `[Obsolete]` before v3 has been removed from the surface. Move to the replacement APIs that the obsolete messages pointed at — text metrics and drawing move to `SKFont` and `SKTextBlob`, and `FilterQuality` moves to `SKSamplingOptions`. Compatibility overloads for `SKFilterQuality` are kept where possible. ([#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539), [#2924](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2924), [#2963](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2963), [#2789](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2789))

## Engine

- **Skia bumped to milestone 116** — Updates the bundled Skia to milestone 116 as the baseline for the v3 line. — ❤️ [@Redth](https://github.com/Redth) ([#2829](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2829), [#2885](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2885), [#3026](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3026))
- **Native dependencies refreshed** — Rolls HarfBuzz to 7.3.0 then 8.3.0, WebP to 1.3.2, and updates libjpeg-turbo (rolling back the 3.0.0 attempt to 2.1.5.1 for stability). ([#2582](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2582), [#2624](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2624), [#2622](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2622), [#2583](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2583), [#2699](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2699))

## API Surface

- **WinUI accelerated views and WPF SKGLElement** — Adds support for WinUI accelerated views alongside the existing XAML canvas, and adds `SKGLElement` to `SkiaSharp.Views.WPF` for GPU-accelerated WPF hosting. — ❤️ [@gmurray81](https://github.com/gmurray81) ([#2733](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2733), [#2317](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2317))
- **SKImage.ToRawShader and SKBlender** — Adds `SKImage.ToRawShader` for unpremultiplied image shaders, and exposes `SKBlender` as a first-class type on `SKPaint`. ([#2748](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2748), [#2830](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2830))
- **SKGLView implementation and text-blob APIs restored** — Implements `SKGLView` and re-adds the text-based `SKTextBlob` builders, cleans up `SKTextBlobBuilder`/`SKRunBuffer` and adds the R-Tree overload of `BeginRecording`. ([#2598](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2598), [#2545](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2545), [#2775](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2775), [#2889](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2889), [#2883](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2883))
- **More Span<T> overloads and pixel-span offsets** — Adds `Span<SKPoint>` overloads to the color filters, `GetPixelSpan` overloads with offsets, and a `Span`-based `SetRectRadii` overload. — ❤️ [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313) ([#2879](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2879), [#2609](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2609), [#2949](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2949))
- **Skottie animation builder bound** — Binds Skottie's animation builder so Lottie/Skottie animations can be constructed from managed code. ([#2630](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2630))
- **Function pointers and `LibraryImport`** — Migrates the P/Invoke surface to `LibraryImport` and function pointers where possible, and makes the `PlatformConfiguration` properties trimmable. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917), [#2717](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2717))

## Bug Fixes

- **Snapshot on Apple Metal no longer returns magenta** — Fixes `SKSurface.Snapshot` returning solid magenta on the Apple Metal backend. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#2804](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2804))
- **SKPaint clone disposal no longer AVEs** — Fixes an `AccessViolationException` when disposing a cloned `SKPaint`. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#2904](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2904))
- **Uno SKXamlCanvas fixes** — Ensures the canvas context is active when rendering, avoids failing on WASM when the canvas cannot be found, handles a null `XamlRoot` when the canvas unloads, and switches Uno Skia to Bgra8888. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban), [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313) ([#2559](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2559), [#2563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2563), [#2854](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2854), [#2918](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2918))
- **Blazor components expose DPI** — Exposes DPI on the Blazor components so high-DPI scaling is correctly propagated to the canvas. — ❤️ [@beto-rodriguez](https://github.com/beto-rodriguez) ([#1832](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/1832))
- **Kerning-pair adjustments and rect flooring** — Fixes `GetKerningPairAdjustments` and floors outwards when converting to `SKRectI` so pixel-perfect rounding behaves. — ❤️ [@pdjonov](https://github.com/pdjonov) ([#2858](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2858), [#2568](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2568))
- **MAUI view memory leaks fixed** — Fixes memory leaks in the MAUI views so long-lived apps no longer accumulate native handles. ([#2955](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2955))
- **PNG encoder options behaviour restored** — Reverts `SKBitmap.Encode` with `SKPngEncoderOptions` to the 2.88.8 behaviour so existing PNG encoding output stays byte-identical. — ❤️ [@sungaila](https://github.com/sungaila) ([#3014](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3014))

## Platform

- **Mac Catalyst uses Metal** — Switches the Mac Catalyst backend to Metal and brings the Metal APIs to a common .NET TFM. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2747](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2747), [#2788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2788))
- **.NET 8 baseline and .NET 9 support** — Moves the SDK, workloads and projects to .NET 8, and adds .NET 9 support so consumers can target the new runtime. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban) ([#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927), [#2971](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2971), [#3010](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3010))
- **WinForms GLControl packages updated** — Uses the new `GLControl` packages for the WinForms accelerated view. ([#2989](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2989))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Repository modernised for v3** — Modernises the repository, splits packaging, validates the generated interop files, migrates to 1ES pipelines, and switches to the new license expressions. ([#2505](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2505), [#2737](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2737), [#2831](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2831), [#2770](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2770), [#2878](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2878))
- **Managed runtime-only files packaged correctly** — Correctly packages managed runtime-only files and stops putting metadata into package versions so NuGet versions stay under the 64-character cap. ([#2741](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2741), [#2743](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2743), [#2707](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2707))
- **ANGLE reaches the NuGet packages** — Builds ANGLE separately and makes sure the ANGLE bits reach the NuGet packages on Windows. ([#2970](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2970), [#2950](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2950))
- **Unused tools and dependencies pruned** — Disables and removes a raft of unused or problematic tools and dependencies so the shipping surface stays lean. ([#2873](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2873), [#2876](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2876), [#2880](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2880), [#2588](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2588), [#2703](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2703), [#2710](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2710))

## Preview 5 (October 24, 2024)

Preview 5 cleaned up the `SKPngEncoderOptions` behaviour, added the `Span<SKPoint>` `SetRectRadii` overload and the `SKFilterQuality` compatibility overloads, and made sure ANGLE reaches the NuGet packages.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.4.1...v3.0.0-preview.5.4)

## Preview 4 (July 18, 2024)

Preview 4 fixed the cloned-`SKPaint` AVE, added the R-Tree `BeginRecording` overload, moved to .NET 8, and cleaned up MAUI view memory leaks.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.3.1...v3.0.0-preview.4.1)

## Preview 3 (April 9, 2024)

Preview 3 bumped Skia to m116, added `SKBlender`, `SKGLElement` for WPF, and switched Mac Catalyst to Metal.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.2.1...v3.0.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (February 20, 2024)

Preview 2 bound Skottie's animation builder, added Metal on Mac Catalyst and the `SKImage.ToRawShader` API.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.1.8...v3.0.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (February 6, 2024)

Preview 1 opened the v3 line — repository modernised, `[Obsolete]` members removed, text blobs restored, `SKGLView` implemented, WinUI accelerated views added, and Blazor DPI exposed.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v2.88.9...v3.0.0-preview.1.8)
